title: U Mass - C-reactive Peptide
author: Jason Kim

steps_raw.instruction: Perform daily quality control assessment of instrumentation before analysis.
Load each sample into a specialized micro-sample cup for the clinical chemistry analyzer.
Select C-reactive Peptide test on display and run the analysis.
